prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类/理科最低位次约 17546→19110→36099（异常断档）→25726→28493，剔除 2023 年异常值后，近 3 年（2022–2025）位次从 19110 后移至 28493，累计后移约 9300 名，整体呈波动后移趋势；2025 年基准约 28493 名；该校在黑龙江省物理类/理科计划 2021 年 31 人、2022 年 35 人、2023 年 35 人、2024 年 42 人、2025 年 41 人；2026 年计划 41 人，与 2025 年持平，计划因素对竞争影响中性。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 内蒙古大学为 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名近年约第 113–120 名，2026 年升至第 114 名，排名稳中有升，对考生吸引力略有增强；该校在 2021–2026 年声誉舆情文件中均未被记录，声誉平稳无重大事件；抖音热度总排名第 101 位，评价为「一般」，综合热度 105483，在 211 高校中关注度偏低，报考热度无明显升温信号；第五轮学科评估文件中未收录内蒙古大学数据，说明该校无 A- 及以上学科，优势学科对报考的拉动作用有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 黑龙江省 2026 年普通高考总人数约 167000 人，较 2025 年（历史类 54707+物理类 117407=172114）减少约 3%，考生规模小幅下降，竞争压力略有缓解。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合招生计划持平、考生总数小幅下降、学校排名稳中有升、声誉平稳等因素，在 2025 年基准 28493 名基础上，预计竞争略有加剧，位次小幅后移；预测最低位次约 28543 名，区间 28043–29043 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category/Science were approximately 17546→19110→36099 (abnormal gap)→25726→28493. Excluding the 2023 anomaly, the rankings over the past three years (2022–2025) shifted from 19110 to 28493, a cumulative backward shift of about 9300 places, showing an overall fluctuating backward trend. The 2025 baseline is approximately 28493. The university's enrollment plan in Heilongjiang for Physics Category/Science was 31 in 2021, 35 in 2022, 35 in 2023, 42 in 2024, and 41 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 41, unchanged from 2025, so the plan factor has a neutral impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Inner Mongolia University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university. Its Soft Science main ranking has been around 113–120 in recent years, rising to 114th in 2026, showing a steady increase, slightly enhancing its appeal to candidates. The university was not recorded in the reputation and public opinion files from 2021 to 2026, indicating a stable reputation with no major incidents. Its overall Douyin popularity ranking is 101st, rated as 'average', with a comprehensive popularity score of 105483, indicating low attention among 211 universities and no clear signal of rising application heat. The fifth round of discipline evaluation files does not include Inner Mongolia University data, indicating no A- or above disciplines, so the pulling effect of advantageous disciplines on applications is limited.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in Heilongjiang Province is about 167,000, a decrease of about 3% from 2025 (historical category 54,707 + physics category 117,407 = 172,114), with a slight decline in candidate scale, slightly easing competition pressure.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as unchanged enrollment plans, a slight decrease in total candidates, a steady rise in university ranking, and stable reputation, based on the 2025 baseline of 28493, competition is expected to intensify slightly, with rankings shifting backward slightly. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 28543, with a range of 28043–29043.

Those with rankings better than 28000 can focus on popular majors like Computer Science and Software Engineering; those with rankings between 28500–29000 are advised to prioritize medium-difficulty majors such as Electronic Information, Mathematics, and Accounting; those with rankings near 29000 should prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 2368→2250→1660→6858 (new college entrance examination reform year)→3466. In 2024, due to the first implementation of the new college entrance examination 'History Category' model in Heilongjiang Province, the ranking fluctuated significantly to 6858, but quickly rebounded to 3466 in 2025, showing drastic fluctuations in the past two years. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 3466th place. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts/history category in Heilongjiang Province was 6 students in 2021, 4 in 2022, 4 in 2023, 8 in 2024, and 9 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 9 students, unchanged from 2025, so the enrollment plan factor has a neutral impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; approximately 114th in the Soft Science main ranking, with stable and slightly rising rankings in recent years. Reputation is stable with no major public incidents. Douyin popularity is average, with low application attention. No A- or above discipline data, and the advantageous disciplines have limited appeal for applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the number of history category examinees in Heilongjiang Province is estimated to be about 53,106 based on the recent proportion (approximately 31.8%), a decrease of about 3% from 54,707 in 2025, slightly easing competition pressure.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as unchanged enrollment plans, a slight decrease in history category examinees, and stable university rankings, based on the 2025 baseline of 3466th place, competition is expected to ease slightly, with rankings moving up modestly.
